summary: Phase 3 P0 testing complete - JARVIS Intelligence Layer, 11-step analysis pipeline, Regime Detection, and Manipulation Detection. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows working.

minor.issue: GPT-5.2 can take 30-60 seconds for complex report explanations - may timeout with default 30s

ui_bugs.issue: JARVIS floating button at bottom-right overlaps with 'Made with Emergent' badge, causing click interception. Works after hiding badge.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/analysis/start returns 11 steps (all complete)
Backend: Analysis steps include regime_detection and manipulation_detection
Backend: Report contains 'regime' object with trend_regime, volatility_regime, market_phase, regime_summary
Backend: Report contains 'manipulation' object with score, risk_level, events_detected, warnings, summary
Backend: GET /api/analysis/history returns saved analyses from MongoDB
Backend: POST /api/jarvis/chat responds with intelligent GPT-5.2 response to 'What is RSI?'
Backend: POST /api/jarvis/chat handles analysis_context for context-aware responses
Backend: POST /api/jarvis/explain-report generates report explanation
Backend: GET /api/jarvis/history returns conversation messages
Frontend: Login at /login with demo@aureos.com / Demo1234! works
Frontend: Dashboard loads with JARVIS copilot button visible at bottom-right
Frontend: Navigation to /analysis page works
Frontend: Search for 'BTC', select it, shows Asset Confirmed card with CRYPTO badge
Frontend: 'Start Full Analysis' triggers 11-step pipeline with 100% completion
Frontend: All 11 pipeline steps display with green checkmarks including Regime Detection (step 10) and Manipulation Scan (step 11)
Frontend: Pipeline shows real-time data: regime='strong bear', phase='contraction', manipulation score=98
Frontend: 'Executive Report' button opens modal with all sections
Frontend: Executive Report modal shows 'Market Regime' section with Trend Regime, Volatility, Market Phase
Frontend: Executive Report modal shows 'Manipulation Detection' section with score, events detected, warnings
Frontend: JARVIS trigger button is golden/yellow as specified
Frontend: JARVIS copilot window opens with JARVIS branding ('Central Intelligence Core')
Frontend: JARVIS shows 'Context Active' badge when analysis is present
Frontend: JARVIS chat input and send button are functional
Frontend: JARVIS quick action buttons work ('Explain my analysis', 'What is RSI?', 'Position sizing')
critical_code_review_comments: All 11 analysis steps properly implemented and returning complete status
Regime Detection correctly classifies bull/bear/sideways trends, volatility regimes, and market phases
Manipulation Detection identifies liquidity sweeps, stop hunts, volume anomalies, false breakouts
JARVIS chat powered by GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key - real AI responses
Analysis history correctly saved to MongoDB 'analysis_history' collection
Executive Report modal properly displays Regime and Manipulation sections at bottom
JARVIS copilot shows context-aware 'Context Active' badge when analysis is loaded
seed_data_creation: None required - existing demo user used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 P0 JARVIS Intelligence Layer fully tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_phase3_jarvis_regime_manipulation.py. All 11 analysis steps complete including new regime_detection and manipulation_detection. JARVIS chat calls GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations library - may take 5-10s for responses. Executive Report modal includes Market Regime and Manipulation Detection sections. Minor UI issue: JARVIS button overlaps with Emergent badge but works with force click.

mocked_components.note: Stocks, Forex, Commodities, and Indices use MOCK DATA. Only Crypto uses real CoinGecko API. JARVIS uses REAL GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key.

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No critical issues found. All Phase 3 P0 features tested and working correctly.
